name: codecompass-mcp
description: CodeCompass MCP Server - 生成可点击的代码分屏跳转链接

scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run package:extension
scripts.setup:extension: npm --prefix extensions/codecompass-preview install && npm --prefix extensions/codecompass-preview run build
scripts.package:extension: npm --prefix extensions/codecompass-preview install && npm --prefix extensions/codecompass-preview run build && cd extensions/codecompass-preview && npx vsce package --no-dependencies --allow-missing-repository
scripts.setup:all: npm run build && npm run setup:extension
